LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT EDWARD MURPHY'S MOTION FOR MODIFICATION OF ORDER CONFIRMING SALE OF REAL PROPERTY. GRANTED. THE SUM OF $ 822,343.29 REPRESENTS MR. MURPHY'S PROCEEDS AS THE SELLER. THE SALES REFEREE IS DIRECTED TO INSTRUCT TO DIRECT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE TO TRANSFER 822,343.29, PLUS ANY ACCRUED INTEREST ON THIS AMOUNT, TO A 1031 EXCHANGE COMPANY SELECTED BY MR. MURPHY. THIS ORDER IS STAYED 20 DAYS, OR UNTIL SEPTEMBER 19, 2012. MR. MCCAULEY, COUNSEL FOR CROSS COMPLAINANT/DEFENDANT SHERIE MATZA, REQUESTS THAT THE COURT ISSUE A STATEMENT OF DECISION. THE COURT ORDERS COUNSEL FOR MS. MATZA TO SEND TO THE COURT (BY WAY OF EMAIL) A REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION WITH AUTHORITY AS TO WHY A STATEMENT OF DECISION IS REQUIRED. THIS REQUEST MUST BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT (COPYING OPPOSING COUNSEL) BY END OF BUSINESS AUG-31-2012. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT EDWARD MURPHY MAY SUBMIT RESPONSE VIA EMAIL BY END OF BUSINESS SEP-04-2012. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER TRACKING TODAY'S RULINGS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 04:15 P.M. In Dept 608

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Modification Of Order Confirmiong Sale Of Real Property; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: appearances:
michael j. odonoghue, defendant/cross complainant in pro per.
walter j.r. traver, esq., musick peeler, 415.281.2022, for plaintiff/cross defendant edward murphy.
j. brian mccauley, esq., a professional corporation, 415.974.1515, for cross complainant/defendant sherie matza.

ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. plaintiff/CROSS DEFENDANT EDWARD MURPHY'S Motion For Modification Of Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property. Granted. The sum of $ 822,343.29 represents Mr. Murphy's proceeds as the seller. The Sales Referee is directed to instruct to direct First American Title to transfer 822,343.29, plus any accrued interest on this amount, to a 1031 exchange company selected by Mr. Murphy. This order is stayed 20 days, or until September 19, 2012. mr. mccauley, counsel for cross complainant/defendant sherie matza, requests that the court issue a statement of decision. The court orders counsel for ms. matza to send to the court (by way of email) a request for statement of decision with authority as to why a statement of decision is required. This request must be submitted to the court (copying opposing counsel) by end of business aug-31-2012. Counsel for plaintiff/cross defendant Edward Murphy may submit response via email by end of business sep-04-2012. Counsel for plaintiff/cross defendant is ordered to prepare proposed order tracking today's rulings. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Modification Of Order Confirmiong Sale Of Real Property; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Continued To Aug-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Mtn For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JOHN MCINERNEY III'S MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING SALE OF REAL PROPERTY.
Appearances: Walter J.R. Traver of Musick Peeler (281.2022) for defendants Edward Murphy and EJM Contractors; Christy J. Styer of Michael B. Bassi, A Law Corp. (986.8122 x710) for Sale Referee John McInerney III; Mr. O'Donoghue (no card provided) appearing in propria persona; Counsel McCauley (no card provided).
Although this case is singly assigned to Judge Karnow, the parties did not object to having Judge Kahn decide this matter. Argued and the court ruled as follows: original buyers' bid is superseded and the court approved and confirmed the sale pursuant to the terms of the order signed in court. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
